ns0:entry.ns0:title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
Language: typescript
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EtienneLescot/n8n-as-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EtienneLescot/n8n-as-code
Language: typescript
Give your AI agent n8n superpowers. 537 nodes with full schemas, 7,700+ templates, Git-like sync, and TypeScript workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KeygraphHQ/shannon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KeygraphHQ/shannon
Language: typescript
Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: VoltAgent/voltagent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VoltAgent/voltagent
Language: typescript
AI Agent Engineering Platform built on an Open Source TypeScript AI Agent Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/page-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent
Language: typescript
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ant-design/ant-design
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design
Language: typescript
An enterprise-class UI design language and React UI library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hicccc77/WeFlow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hicccc77/WeFlow
Language: typescript
WeFlow - 一个本地的微信聊天记录导出和年度报告应用

ns0:entry.ns0:title: immich-app/immich
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/immich-app/immich
Language: typescript
High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lyswhut/lx-music-desktop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lyswhut/lx-music-desktop
Language: typescript
一个基于 Electron 的音乐软件

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moeru-ai/airi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi
Language: typescript
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: n8n-io/n8n
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n
Language: typescript
Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siyuan-note/siyuan
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siyuan-note/siyuan
Language: typescript
A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: superset-sh/superset
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/superset-sh/superset
Language: typescript
Code Editor for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tobi/qmd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tobi/qmd
Language: typescript
mini cli search engine for your docs, knowledge bases, meeting notes, whatever. Tracking current sota approaches while being all local

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vitejs/vite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vitejs/vite
Language: typescript
Next generation frontend tooling. It's fast!
